overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a rainy night in an urban commercial district. The player stands at a street corner observing traffic passing a illuminated bank building, then turns and walks along the wet sidewalk past storefronts and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with bank building

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives through the intersection from left to right
black sedan approaches and drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner rotating to watch vehicles pass through the rainy intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving through the wet intersection from left to right with headlights on

entered.detail: two-story modern bank building with illuminated FLEECA signage and glass facade
single-story commercial building with distinctive green neon roof trim and stone facade
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
tall street lamps casting reflections on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Standing at a rainy urban intersection at night, the camera faces a modern bank building with illuminated signage. A yellow taxi passes through the intersection, followed by other vehicles. Street lights reflect off the wet asphalt while palm trees line the distant sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked vehicles and trash receptacles

events.description: camera finishes panning left and begins walking forward along the sidewalk
passing close by concrete trash cans partially blocking the left side of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past the green-roofed building and parked cars, with weapon visible at bottom of frame

entered.detail: white BMW SUV parked along the curb with headlights off
pair of cylindrical concrete trash receptacles on the sidewalk edge
thick palm tree trunk with detailed bark texture close to the path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and proceeds walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk. The green-roofed building recedes behind as the viewer passes a parked white SUV and concrete trash cans. Palm trees line the walkway while street lights illuminate the wet concrete surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stationary observation of a rainy urban intersection to a walking tour along a wet commercial sidewalk. It begins facing a modern bank building with illuminated signage, where a yellow taxi and other vehicles pass through the intersection across asphalt reflecting the glow of street lights. As the camera turns left, the bank and its green roof recede into the background while the viewer begins moving forward. The scene then shifts to a perspective of the rain-soaked walkway, passing a parked white SUV and concrete trash cans. Finally, the camera continues along the wet concrete surface, flanked by a line of palm trees under the persistent glow of the city lights.
